content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:5 SecureField) but review credentials are placeholders (`test`/`changeme` in review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) and notes.txt is just "TBD".
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when reviewers cannot sign in to reach core functionality, and placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme" plus "TBD" notes almost guarantee a metadata-rejected loop. Replace these with a working demo account and notes explaining how to reach the main features behind the login. Verify the account actually authenticates in the submitted build before uploading.
